title: Software Update - Tapping on "Software Update"  button on Home Screen opens Software Update tab in Device Settings
scenario: Tapping Software Update button on Home Screen navigates to Software Update tab in Device Settings showing all device components
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
On the Home screen, locate and tap the "Software Update" button.
expected: The Software Update tab opens within Device Settings, displaying all device components (e.g., Headset/Earbuds and Charge Case/Stand if applicable).
